series_metadata.series_title: Investment Compliance Reporting Worksheets for State Accounts
series_metadata.series_description: Logs completed daily that document compliance exceptions to the relevant investment policies, and forms completed weekly, monthly or on an adhoc basis that document compliance to relevant sections of the investment policies that fall outside the daily exception reporting. Supporting documentation is also archived where necessary.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
